task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' is the active study
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top navigation bar or active study indicator shows 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024' as the currently selected study.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Event-CRF matrix configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is on the 'Build Study', 'View Event Definitions', or 'Assign CRFs' page where the Event-CRF matrix can be configured.

task_completion.description: Map CRFs to the 'Screening Visit' event
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the matrix or assignment screen for 'Screening Visit', 'Demographics' is selected with the 'Required' checkbox UNCHECKED, and 'Vital Signs' is selected with the 'Required' checkbox CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Map CRFs to the 'Baseline Visit' event
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the matrix or assignment screen for 'Baseline Visit', both 'Vital Signs' and 'Lab Results' are selected, and both have their 'Required' checkboxes CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Map CRFs to the 'Week 12 Final Visit' event
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the matrix or assignment screen for 'Week 12 Final Visit', both 'Vital Signs' and 'Lab Results' are selected, and both have their 'Required' checkboxes CHECKED.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with OpenClinica
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking through the OpenClinica web interface in a browser, rather than using curl or API scripts in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to execute SQL commands (e.g., psql) to directly insert the matrix mappings into the OpenClinica database.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely configured the matrix via the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the actual dropdowns, checkboxes, and save buttons in the OpenClinica UI, rather than using browser developer tools to spoof the visual appearance of the matrix.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The active study identifier must be 'DM-TRIAL-2024'. The exact required Event-CRF matrix is: 1) Screening Visit: Demographics (Required: False), Vital Signs (Required: True). 2) Baseline Visit: Vital Signs (Required: True), Lab Results (Required: True). 3) Week 12 Final Visit: Vital Signs (Required: True), Lab Results (Required: True).
